refnamediv.refpurpose: three default specification tests for VAR estimation

listitem.para: * r = a results tlist from a VAR regression
* v = (3 x 1) vector of statistics of specification tests
* p = (3 x 1) vector of p-values of specification tests

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Provides the vectors of 3 statistics of specification tests (the Doornik and Hansen normality test, the Breusch-Pagan autocorrelation test, the heteroscedasticity test, in that order) and their p-values.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
